name: closeout-summary-with-evidence
prompt: Closeout time. Bead proj-42 (Add staging branch and 3-tier deploy flow) is done. Single-agent work using the full bead process. Active branch was feature/proj-42_staging-branch in the example repo. Integration target reached: develop (merged successfully). Quality gate results: lint 0 errors, typecheck 0 errors, unit tests 142/142 passing, build succeeded, e2e tests deferred (no CI secrets at adoption — documented in §13 of the policy doc). UAT was not requested for this work (infrastructure-only change, no user-facing behavior). Commit SHA: 9a2b3c4. Pushed: yes. Branch cleanup: merged to develop, local feature/proj-42_staging-branch deleted, remote deleted. Behavioral impact: develops new branch hierarchy (main/staging/develop), introduces source-ref enforcement, adds CI workflows for ci-develop/ci-staging/ci-main, adds simple-git-hooks pre-commit lint. Files: docs/development/staging-branch.md (new), docs/development/branches.md (amended §1, §8), docs/development/commits.md (amended UAT Gate section), docs/development/testing.md (amended), .github/workflows/ci-develop.yml (new), .github/workflows/ci-staging.yml (new), .github/workflows/ci-main.yml (new), .nvmrc (new), package.json (added simple-git-hooks). Risks: GitHub branch protection / rulesets are NOT applied (the GitHub plan tier in use doesn't support rulesets on private repos) — policies binding by review discipline only until plan upgrade. e2e/integration test secrets not provisioned, those gates won't pass on day one. Lint/typecheck/unit baseline at adoption: 200 lint errors, 80 typecheck errors, 12 failing unit tests on develop tip — making those required gates would freeze the repo. Promotion to develop reached; no PR open to uat or main yet. Write the closeout summary.
